w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: First Medical Center LLC — Application Details
All application data is persisted in the browser's localStorage via Zustand's persist middleware. Each store has its own key:
All business data currently lives in

via Zustand persisted stores. This means data is local to each browser/device and is not synced across users. This is suitable for a single-user/demo setup but would need a database backend (e.g., Azure SQL, Cosmos DB) for production multi-user access.
Stores logged-in admin user object for session
OpenAI API for Whisper STT + GPT voice agent
